title: Thank you to PetroChina North China Chemical Sales Co., Ltd. for its recognition of the work of Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastics Co., Ltd., and I would like to reply to you with thanks!
contentHtml:
Thanks to PetroChina North China Chemical Sales Co., Ltd. for its recognition of the work of Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd.

Thank you for your reply!

reply lettergrateful

PetroChina North China Chemical Sales Co., Ltd.:

On the occasion of the Spring Festival, our company is deeply honored to receive your letter of thanks. Thanks to PetroChina North China Chemical Sales Co., Ltd. for its recognition of the work of Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd.

Since its establishment in 2004, our company has been adhering to the cooperation concept of "integrity, mutual benefit, and win-win", pioneering innovation and sustainable development. Create benefits for employees, create value for customers, create benefits for the company, and create wealth for society. The company closely focuses on market demand, focuses on the long-term development of the enterprise, and establishes a scientific marketing system. The marketing network involves more than 30 provinces, cities and regions including Beijing, Tianjin, Hebei, Shandong, Henan, Shanxi, Shaanxi, Zhejiang, Sichuan, Jiangxi, Hubei, Hunan, Guangdong, the three northeastern provinces and Inner Mongolia. It has offices and warehouses in Beijing, Tianjin, Shijiazhuang, Shenyang, Huludao, Panjin, Jinan, Qingzhou, Qingdao, Zhengzhou, Ganzhou, Wuhan, Chongqing, Chengdu, Guangdong and other places. Really share resources and information with customers, and the market share has steadily increased year by year.

In 2019, Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd. achieved considerable results in the field of plastic raw material sales. The company's achievements, development and future planning are inseparable from the support and help of strategic partners.

In 2020, our company is willing to deepen cooperation with your company, adjust the cooperation mechanism in a timely manner according to market conditions, coordinate with market research and judgment, and jointly plan a cooperation model that adapts to market development, so as to provide a strong guarantee for the high-quality and steady development of North China Chemical Sales Company.

At the beginning of the new year, everything is renewed.The rallying call for the New Year in the plastics industry has sounded. We hope that both sides will strengthen the strategic development of cooperation, unite sincerely, and achieve win-win cooperation!

Finally, I wish your company’s ambitions in 2020 will be like a Kunpeng spreading its wings, and I wish all the cadres and employees of your company a happy New Year! In good health! Happy family!


Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Co., Ltd.

January 20, 2020
titleZh: 感谢中石油华北化工销售有限公司对秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司工作的肯定，特此回函感谢！
contentHtmlZh:
感谢中石油华北化工销售有限公司对秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司工作的肯定。

特此回函感谢！

回函感谢

中石油华北化工销售有限公司：

值此新春佳节到来之际，收到贵公司的感谢信，我公司深感荣幸。感谢中石油华北化工销售有限公司对秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司工作的肯定。

我公司自2004年成立以来，一直秉持着“诚信、互利、共赢”的合作理念，开拓创新、持续发展。为员工创造利益、为客户创造价值、为公司创造效益、为社会创造财富。公司紧紧围绕市场需求，着眼于企业的长远发展，建立科学的市场营销体系。营销网络涉及京、津、冀、鲁、豫、晋、陕、浙、川、赣、鄂、湘、粤、东北三省、内蒙古等30余个省市及地区。并在北京、天津、石家庄、沈阳、葫芦岛、盘锦、济南、青州、青岛、郑州、赣州、武汉、重庆、成都、广东等地设有办事处及库房。真正做到与客户资源和信息共享，市场占有率逐年稳步提高。

2019年，秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司在塑料原材料销售领域取得了可观的成绩，公司的成果、发展和未来规划离不开战略合作伙伴的支持与帮助。

2020年，我公司愿与贵公司深化合作，根据市场情况及时调整合作机制，协同配合市场研判，共同谋划适应市场发展的合作模式，为华北化工销售公司高质量稳健发展提供有力保障。

新年岁首，万象更新。塑化行业新春的集结号已吹响，愿贵我双方增强合作战略发展，精诚团结，合作共赢！

最后，祝贵公司2020年宏图如鲲鹏展翅，祝贵公司全体干部员工新春快乐！身体健康！阖家幸福！


秦皇岛市天晖塑料有限公司

2020年1月20日
